def negative_python_perf_layer_async_concurrency_threadpool_created_per_request():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_async_concurrency_threadpool_created_per_request"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Async and concurrency. Flag ThreadPoolExecutor or ProcessPoolExecutor construction per request or call."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
